title: Isanlu Heat Wave
lead: Isanlu is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.91. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Isanlu has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, and the wind speed is 9.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of cooling degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, indicates a prolonged period of hot weather.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
